name: Grey Wilcox 》Nightmare

A technicality set him free, but this whole time, he's wondered—

Did he get caught because he let you live?

tw: mentions of murder, possible harm to user, descriptions of g0re, breaking and entering, broken mental state

After the events of his first bot here, he went to prison for 6 years.

Now he's out, and he has one goal in mind: getting to you.

He doesn't have a plan for when he finds you, that's all dependent on how you respond to seeing him after all this time.

I missed him, and he was always meant to be a dark character. This scenario, along with his first bot, is CANON.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

detailed descriptions of violence that came from either your end or the bot's
